testcase.name: test_customer_profile_access
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loyalty_refactor_iteration47.py:210: in test_customer_profile_access assert response.status_code == 200, f"Customer profile access failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Customer profile access failed: {"detail":"Permission denied. Required: users.view"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loyalty_refactor_iteration47.py:222: in test_admin_profile_access assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
